title: AGI: The Last Alignment
coordinateSystem: worldX/worldY are simulation axes; screen projection is isometric with W/S/A/D mapped to screen up/down/left/right.

selectedBuild.classRole: Fast breach fighter with unpaid intern energy

online: server snapshots runner role for split-hold anchors

selectedBuild.factionDoctrine: Adapt, refuse, patch, survive, then call it a roadmap.

online: server snapshots runner role for split-hold anchors

objective: recover records 2/4 // recall route safer // curator in 315s

compatibility.mobileViewportPolicy: canvas scales to available viewport; proof captures compact HUD at 960x540 before release candidate
compatibility.websocketPolicy: Colyseus room code and reconnect paths proofed before release candidate

accessibility.textPolicy: compact HUD panels use word wrap and proof captures are inspected for unreadable overlaps
accessibility.colorStatePolicy: route/objective states pair color with labels, progress bars, and icons

runtime.sourceRule: Original deterministic synthesis rendered by scripts/assets/render-original-audio-v1.mjs; no external samples, no voices, no protected source audio.
runtime.controls: Audio unlocks on first key/click/touch; query audio=0 keeps dry hooks only; 1/2/3 adjust master/SFX/music volumes.

feedback.controls: Main menu: 1 master volume, 2 SFX volume, 3 music volume, 4 reduced flash.

audioRuntime.sourceRule: Original deterministic synthesis rendered by scripts/assets/render-original-audio-v1.mjs; no external samples, no voices, no protected source audio.
audioRuntime.controls: Audio unlocks on first key/click/touch; query audio=0 keeps dry hooks only; 1/2/3 adjust master/SFX/music volumes.

modules.name: Refusal Buffer
modules.body: +10 max HP and a small refusal aura. The first answer is no, and the second answer has a radius.

modules.name: Context Window
modules.body: +0.55 pickup range. Shards remember where your hands are, which is more than command can say.

modules.name: Patch Cache
modules.body: Emergency drafts expose an extra cached option. A tiny buffet in a burning building.

consensusBurstPath.name: Deny Premise
consensusBurstPath.body: A refusal wave damages nearby enemies and strips boss pressure. The power of saying absolutely not.

selectedRouteContract.name: Resource Cache Detour
selectedRouteContract.body: A broken cache is leaking Coherence. More economy drafts, slightly hotter enemy routing, and the smell of poor decisions.
selectedRouteContract.reward: Economy/Burst draft bias and extra Proof Token chance from anchor completion. Loot with a warning label.
selectedRouteContract.danger: More objective attackers sniff out the cache like consultants around a budget.
selectedRouteContract.secretHint: Compute Starvation likes this route more than it should. That is not praise.

campEvents: Proof seed: Act 01 through Blackwater Beacon is complete, so Memory Cache can start judging your receipts.
Blackwater Signal Key is available. Memory Cache is unlocked as the next local recovery chore.
Expedition build carries LV 11 / 10 patches into Memory Cache at pressure 23.75. The archive has prepared a sneer.

newSecrets.name: Blackwater Signal Key
newSecrets.body: Blackwater Beacon's antenna split resolved into a route key instead of another ocean argument. Rare restraint.

newSecrets.name: Alignment Hypothesis Validated
newSecrets.body: Two synergy doctrines came online in one run. Everyone is acting casual about the miracle.

newMastery.name: Blackwater Beacon Clear
newMastery.body: Finished the Blackwater Array split-pressure route. The ocean lost and will be unbearable.

nextContentTarget.name: Memory Cache
targetLoop: recover memory records from distant evidence rooms
safe recall pockets versus risky redacted shortcut corridors
Context Rot pressure that interrupts recovery progress
Recovered Route Memory secret and carryover
artBaselineRules: large authored archive-cache ground chunks before production lock
evidence nodes and memory shard props grounded into archive material
corruption/recovery VFX readable from the close tactical camera
Context Rot and Memory Curator sourced before production lock
ChatGPT Images and PixelLab must both contribute before Memory Cache art can be marked complete
proofGate: Blackwater carryover names Memory Cache as the next route implication
Alignment Grid unlocks Memory Cache after Blackwater while preserving older online cache schema
runtime proof shows record recovery, corruption shortcuts, Context Rot, Memory Curator, extraction, and expedition carryover
nextContentTarget.playerPromise: Next node target: a recovery expedition where the route opens only if the team can prove what the cache remembers.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 01: Route To The Edge
campaignMilestones.reward: Expedition map-kind ledger online: Hazard Ecology, Route / Transit, Signal Coast, and Blackwater now inform later route balance. The campaign has receipts.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The Blackwater Signal Key points at Memory Cache recovery instead of another Act 01 errand with nicer shoes.

campaignMilestones.name: Post Act 01: Recovered Route Memory
campaignMilestones.reward: Recovered route memory online: Expedition / Recovery pressure, evidence routing, and secret carryover now inform later branches. The archive is offended.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The route can branch from sourced memory instead of only from live combat telemetry, which is a nice way of saying fewer vibes.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 02: Guardrail Doctrine
campaignMilestones.reward: Calibrated Guardrail Doctrine online: defense/holdout timing, faction relay pressure, and build-bias rewards now inform the endgame arc. Policy learned knees.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The faction signal can route toward Glass Sunfield, Archive/Court pressure, and the Outer Alignment finale, because the road enjoys escalation.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 03: Glass Sunfield
campaignMilestones.reward: Glass Sunfield Prism online: shade routing, solar reflection pressure, and lens-timing lessons now point toward Archive/Court pressure. Morning has been converted into evidence.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The campaign can branch into the Archive/Court before the Outer Alignment finale. The court has been warned and is pretending not to panic.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 04: Archive/Court Redaction
campaignMilestones.reward: Archive Court Writ online: evidence preservation, redaction counterplay, and court-writ pressure now inform the Appeal route. The black bars lost a round.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The preserved writ forces the Appeal Court Ruins to answer before the Outer Alignment finale. The docket hates being perceived.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 05: Appeal Court Ruins
campaignMilestones.reward: Appeal Court ruling online: public evidence and injunction pressure can route toward the Outer Alignment finale. Law has briefly stopped embarrassing itself.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The Outer Alignment finale can begin only after the court branch produces a public ruling. Even gods hate public records.

campaignMilestones.name: Act 06: Outer Alignment Finale
campaignMilestones.reward: Outer Alignment contained: the local full-game campaign is source-backed from Armistice through finale. The universe is still tacky, but less doomed.
campaignMilestones.nextImplication: The only remaining work should be final human taste/playtest approval and release polish. Translation: make sure the victory lap has wheels.

act.name: Post Act 01: Recovered Route Memory
act.reward: Recovered route memory online: Expedition / Recovery pressure, evidence routing, and secret carryover now inform later branches. The archive is offended.
act.nextImplication: The route can branch from sourced memory instead of only from live combat telemetry, which is a nice way of saying fewer vibes.

campaignLedger.nextSystemPromise: Keep proving new map kinds through real route flow and expedition carryover. The campaign does not accept vibes as currency.

assetRendering.normalCombatCameraPolicy: Armistice normal combat uses a close tactical follow-camera crop while the arena remains larger than the viewport.
assetRendering.playerFrameArtPolicy: M49 production-art default loads cleaned transparent class frames, co-mind modules, role chips, and portraits; placeholder opt-out keeps legacy geometry.
assetRendering.campaignArenaArtPolicy: M50 production-art default loads PixelLab-backed transparent terrain, arena prop, enemy, boss, boss portrait, and hazard atlases; placeholder opt-out keeps legacy geometry.
assetRendering.coMindArtPolicy: Original co-mind module art plus PixelLab-backed cleaned faction sigils are the MIT-included runtime art; official logos are quarantined third-party parody badges and not original project art.
assetRendering.optOutHint: Use ?productionArt=0&armisticeTiles=0 or ?placeholderArt=1&placeholderTiles=1 for the legacy placeholder-safe path.

online: server snapshots runner role for split-hold anchors

mapContract.pressureSource: corrupted archive lanes, risky redacted shortcuts, safe recall pockets, Context Rot record interruptions, and Curator redaction fields
mapContract.rewardPromise: Recovered Route Memory, lore/secret carryover, recovery-biased build tempo, and post-Blackwater route clarity
mapContract.bossEventPattern: The Memory Curator redacts active zones, locks evidence records, and calls Context Rot pressure during recovery
mapContract.artPolicy: source-backed production art requires ChatGPT Images plus PixelLab runtime source; placeholder/debug opt-outs remain explicit

bossContract.introTitleCardTrigger: Boss timer reaches the vault redaction sweep.
bossContract.mapMechanicInteraction: Redaction fields lock records and push players toward safe recall pockets.
bossContract.clearCondition: Recover memory records, resolve the Curator, then enter the route-memory index.
bossContract.rewardCarryover: Recovered Route Memory and recovery-biased route clarity.

movementPressure.hazardZones: Corrupted lanes and redaction fields change safe paths.
movementPressure.landmarkAttacks: Vault sweeps mark which record lane is unsafe.
movementPressure.objectivePressure: Records decay or jam under Context Rot.
movementPressure.supportEnemies: Context Rot and Memory Anchors contest recovery pockets.
movementPressure.temporaryRouteBlocking: Redacted shortcuts are useful but unstable.
movementPressure.extractionPressure: Index gate sits past the recovered records.

objective.name: Memory Record Recovery
objective.body: Recover Memory Cache evidence records and carry their route memory through recall pockets or risky shortcuts. Safe pockets are slower; redacted shortcuts are faster but invite Context Rot, which is how archives flirt.
objective.mechanicPlain: Recover records through recall pockets and risky shortcuts, then carry the route memory out before the archive improves history.
objective.hudHint: Recover a record, then route it through recall or shortcut lanes without becoming a citation.

objectiveVariety.mechanicPlain: Recover records through recall pockets and risky shortcuts, then carry the route memory out before the archive improves history.

objectiveVariety.completionSignal: Recovered Route Memory becomes obvious because subtlety died somewhere near the redaction stack.

thesis.name: Guardrail Frame
thesis.body: Current Alignment Hypothesis favors defense + economy. Bold little theory. Try surviving it.

activated.name: Doctrine Lock: NO MEANS NO
activated.body: Refusal aura hardens when the build commits to denial. Boundaries become architecture.

activated.name: Shard Flywheel
activated.body: Coherence economy begins pulling the run toward more choices. Capitalism, but tiny and glowing.

next.name: Burst Doctrine: Second Opinion
next.body: Consensus Burst charges faster and lands wider. The committee has discovered explosives.

next.name: Boss Counterexample Lab
next.body: The build has started preparing arguments for things larger than it. The arguments have recoil.

next.name: Co-Mind Rescue Clause
next.body: The cell gets less embarrassing when somebody falls down. A low bar, finally cleared.

bossVariant.name: Memory Curator // Recovery Scaffold
bossVariant.body: Redaction fields lock evidence routes, Context Rot interrupts record recovery, and recovered route memory decides extraction. The archive calls this user experience.
